spans.content: This work tackles the problem of geo-localization
with anew paradigm using a large vision-language
Challenge: The scarcity of data for training the
numerous low-quality images lacking visual clues,
Dataset:We devise a CLIP-based network to
quantify the locatability of street-view images,
resulting in the creation of a new dataset
obtained from real geo-localization games, tapping
tuning through dedicated reasoning and location-
StreetCLIP in performance while requiring fewer
Street-View Images: A total of over 130k street-view images
with geo-tags collected from Google Street View
Textual Clues: A total of over 3K textual clues that encapsulate
rich geo-localization information from GeoGuessrand Tuxun
The architecture of GeoReasoner consists of three modules:
Vision Encoder,VL Adapterand Pre-trained LLM.The model
undergoes a two-fold supervised fine-tuning process: reasoning
tuning and location tuning, to enable geo-localization with
Comparison of Precision,RecallandF1scores in country-level and city-level geo-localization.
*represents the model trained on high-locatability GSV images.
